title: Brandads 17 AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Ultra-premium luxury fashion advertisement collage, 4:5 vertical magazine campaign layout, featuring a stunning and elegant female model promoting Vellum Atelier. Multiple high-fashion poses across a modern editorial grid layout, each frame showing different confident and graceful expressions. Full body pose, close-up beauty shot, side profile pose, sitting pose, walking pose, luxury commercial photography. The model is wearing architectural perfume bottle, designed in pearl white, graphite, mist blue, and silver and pearl white, graphite, mist blue, and silver with sophisticated styling and premium fashion details. Color palette: soft pastel tones, elegant luxury colors, creamy beige, champagne gold, blush pink, pearl white, light lavender, subtle cinematic lighting, premium beauty campaign aesthetic. Center section includes professional advertising typography: Vellum Atelier Ultra-premium luxury fashion advertisement collage direction Ultra-premium luxury fashion advertisement collage direction Luxury icons
